### render_scrollbar_thumb

``` python

def render_scrollbar_thumb(
    state:VirtualCollectionState, # Collection state
    config:VirtualCollectionConfig, # Collection config
    ids:VirtualCollectionHtmlIds, # HTML IDs
    track_height:float=600.0, # Track height for min thumb calculation
    oob:bool=False, # Whether to include hx-swap-oob
)->functools.partial(<function ft_hx at 0x7f9f5672b600>, 'div'): # Thumb element

```

*Render the scrollbar thumb at the correct position.*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### render_scrollbar

``` python

def render_scrollbar(
    state:VirtualCollectionState, # Collection state
    config:VirtualCollectionConfig, # Collection config
    ids:VirtualCollectionHtmlIds, # HTML IDs
)->functools.partial(<function ft_hx at 0x7f9f5672b600>, 'div'): # Complete scrollbar (track + thumb)

```

*Render the custom scrollbar with track and proportional thumb.*

## Tests

``` python
from fasthtml.common import to_xml
from cjm_fasthtml_virtual_collection.core.models import VirtualCollectionConfig, VirtualCollectionState
from cjm_fasthtml_virtual_collection.core.html_ids import VirtualCollectionHtmlIds

config = VirtualCollectionConfig(prefix="t", min_thumb_height=24)
ids = VirtualCollectionHtmlIds(prefix="t")
```

``` python
# Test scrollbar at start (cursor at 0)
state = VirtualCollectionState(total_items=500, visible_rows=15, window_start=0, cursor_index=0)
sb = render_scrollbar(state, config, ids)
html = to_xml(sb)
assert 'id="t-scrollbar-track"' in html
assert 'id="t-scrollbar-thumb"' in html
assert 'top: 0.00%' in html
assert 'cursor-grab' in html
assert 'data-visible-count="15"' in html
assert 'data-max-position="499"' in html  # Cursor-based: total - 1
print("Scrollbar at start test passed")
```

``` python
# Test scrollbar at end (cursor at last item)
state = VirtualCollectionState(total_items=500, visible_rows=15, window_start=485, cursor_index=499)
sb = render_scrollbar(state, config, ids)
html = to_xml(sb)
assert 'id="t-scrollbar-thumb"' in html
assert 'data-position="499"' in html  # Cursor-based position
print("Scrollbar at end test passed")
```

``` python
# Test scrollbar always visible (auto_hide=False) even when all items fit
state = VirtualCollectionState(total_items=10, visible_rows=15, window_start=0, cursor_index=0)
sb = render_scrollbar(state, config, ids)
html = to_xml(sb)
assert 'id="t-scrollbar-track"' in html
assert 'id="t-scrollbar-thumb"' in html  # Thumb present — always-visible position indicator
assert 'hidden' not in html  # No hidden class
print("Scrollbar always-visible test passed")
```

``` python
# Test OOB thumb (cursor at position 100)
state = VirtualCollectionState(total_items=500, visible_rows=15, window_start=95, cursor_index=100)
thumb = render_scrollbar_thumb(state, config, ids, oob=True)
html = to_xml(thumb)
assert 'hx-swap-oob="outerHTML"' in html
assert 'id="t-scrollbar-thumb"' in html
print("OOB thumb test passed")
```
